issue_title: useSanityQuery does not handle sanity not returning any data
issue_body_preview:
Hi,

since the update to v2 and nuxt v4, we see some entries in sentry like

```
undefined is not an object (evaluating 'g.data.value.data')
```

coming from this line
https://github.com/nuxt-modules/sanity/blob/main/src/runtime/composables/useSanityQuery.ts#L166

It happens when client.fetch for wh
test_description_zh: 在页面中使用 useSanityQuery 组合函数查询 Sanity 数据，模拟 Sanity API 返回空数据（无结果）的场景，观察页面是否正常渲染而不出现运行时错误。
expected_result_zh: 当 Sanity 查询未返回任何数据时，页面应正常渲染而不抛出 'undefined is not an object' 错误，useSanityQuery 返回的 data 值应为 null 或 undefined，页面不会白屏或崩溃。
